message:
fix(css): Remove duplicate CSS definitions causing style conflicts

The main styles.css file had duplicate definitions for several component
classes that were already properly defined in their canonical locations:

Removed duplicates:
- .view-mode-toggle (defined in components.css)
- .detail-viewers (defined in components.css)
- .settings-overlay, .settings-section, .settings-row (defined in components.css)
- .btn (defined in components.css)
- .analysis-sidebar and related classes (defined in desktop-ui.css)
- .quick-stats and related classes (defined in desktop-ui.css)
- .tool-btn and sidebar classes (defined in desktop-ui.css)

The CSS import cascade was causing later definitions in styles.css to
override the canonical ones in components.css and desktop-ui.css, leading
to inconsistent styling. By removing these duplicates, styles now come
from their single canonical source.
